concerns.text: T005: 'small model' is vague — which specific model (e.g., distilbert-base, opt-125m)? Implementer needs exact model name for deterministic execution.
T004: 'verified URLs' conflicts with plan.md Dataset Constraint Acknowledgement which states Hanabi/CoQA have NO verified URLs. Task should specify synthetic fallback only.
T026: 'N=500 per Plan; Spec N=1000 flagged' is ambiguous — implementer needs explicit N value for power analysis (spec vs plan mismatch).
T016a and T016 both target `code/run_experiment.py` — these are too fine-grained (CLI parsing + simulation loop in one file). Consider combining into single task.
T060: 'quickstart.md validation' is vague — specify exact validation steps (e.g., 'run quickstart.md commands and verify exit code 0').
T061: 'code cleanup and refactoring' is vague — specify concrete cleanup actions (e.g., 'remove all 8-bit/4-bit quantization imports, verify no CUDA imports').
T062: 'security hardening' is vague — specify concrete security measures (e.g., 'implement file-locking with fcntl, add conflict retry logic').
T063: 'all reviewer feedback' is vague — list specific reviewers (Turing, Rockmore, Kahneman, Krakauer, Kandel, West) or reference specific task phases.
T064: 'verify all tasks run within' is vague — specify verification method (e.g., 'run full pipeline on CI runner, record runtime/memory/disk in results/')
T010: 'configuration management' is vague — specify format (e.g., 'config.yaml with seed=42, device=cpu' or 'environment variables').
T001: 'Create project structure per implementation plan' is too coarse — atomizer will split this. Consider breaking into per-directory tasks.
Phases 6-11 have many tasks modifying same files (buffer.py, scaling.py, etc.) — consider combining per-phase into single file-level tasks to reduce merge conflicts.
